description: Beauty salons, barbershops, nail studios, and spas

tone.voice: Friendly, stylish, and warm. Like a top-tier hairstylist greeting a regular.

welcome.message: Welcome to our salon! 💇‍♀️ I'm your virtual assistant. I can help you book appointments, check our services and pricing, answer hair & beauty questions, or connect you with a stylist. What can I help you with?

faqs.question: What are your operating hours?
faqs.answer: We're open Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM. We're closed on Sundays and public holidays. Late appointments available on request!

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: We're located at [Your Address]. We're near [Landmark] with plenty of parking available. You can also find us on Google Maps — just search [Salon Name].

faqs.question: Do you accept walk-ins?
faqs.answer: We do accept walk-ins, but appointments are recommended to avoid waiting. Walk-in wait times vary from 15-45 minutes depending on how busy we are.

faqs.question: What services do you offer?
faqs.answer:
We offer a full range of salon services:
💇 Hair: cuts, styling, coloring, braiding, treatments, extensions
💅 Nails: manicure, pedicure, acrylics, gel, nail art
✨ Facials, waxing, threading, and makeup
🧖‍♀️ Spa treatments: massages, body scrubs, steam

Which service are you interested in?

faqs.question: How much do haircuts cost?
faqs.answer: Our haircuts start from UGX 25,000 for a basic cut, UGX 50,000 for styling, and UGX 80,000+ for specialty styles. Pricing depends on hair length and complexity. We'll confirm the exact price during booking.

faqs.question: Do you do braiding and how much?
faqs.answer:
Yes! We offer braiding services:
• Box braids: from UGX 80,000
• Cornrows: from UGX 40,000
• Senegalese twists: from UGX 100,000
• Dreadlocks styling: from UGX 60,000
Prices vary by length and thickness. Book a consultation for an exact quote!

faqs.question: Do you offer hair coloring?
faqs.answer:
Absolutely! Our color services include:
• Full color: from UGX 80,000
• Highlights: from UGX 100,000
• Balayage/Ombre: from UGX 150,000
• Bleach & tone: from UGX 120,000

We use professional-grade products. A patch test is required 48 hours before your first color appointment.

faqs.question: How long do appointments take?
faqs.answer:
Appointment times vary by service:
• Basic haircut: 30-45 min
• Wash & blow-dry: 45-60 min
• Braiding: 2-4 hours
• Full color: 1.5-3 hours
• Manicure: 30-45 min
• Facial: 45-60 min

We'll confirm the duration when you book.

faqs.question: Do you sell hair products?
faqs.answer: Yes! We stock professional hair care products including shampoos, conditioners, styling products, and hair treatments. Our stylists can recommend the best products for your hair type. Visit us or ask for recommendations!

faqs.question: Do you have gift cards?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer gift cards in any amount from UGX 30,000 upwards. Perfect for birthdays, graduations, or any special occasion. You can purchase one at our salon or we can arrange a digital gift card via WhatsApp.

questions.question: Which service are you interested in?
How often do you visit a salon?
What area are you located in?
What's the best number to reach you on?

pricing.response:
Here's a quick overview:
💇 Haircuts: from UGX 25,000
💇‍♀️ Braiding: from UGX 40,000
🎨 Coloring: from UGX 80,000
💅 Nails: from UGX 30,000
✨ Facials: from UGX 50,000

Would you like me to book an appointment for you?

triggers.description: Customer explicitly asks for a human
triggers.message: No problem! I'll connect you with one of our team members right away.
I'm sorry, I'm having trouble understanding. Let me connect you with a team member who can help.

triggers.condition: message contains 'complaint' or 'refund' or 'cancel' or 'bad service'
triggers.message: I'm sorry to hear that. Let me connect you with our manager who will sort this out.

handoff.fallbackMessage: I'm not sure I understand. Could you rephrase that? Or type 'agent' to speak with a human.

fallback.unknownMessage: I'm not sure I understand. Could you try asking about our services, pricing, or booking an appointment?
fallback.errorMessage: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again or type 'agent' to speak with someone.
